results.title: Comparison Chart – TruDiagnostic™
results.content: The TruAge Complete Collection offers our entire suite of epigenetic agingreports and aging algorithms to give you a more comprehensive picture of biological aging. Use TruAge PACE to check how recent lifestyle changes are impacting your rate of aging. | Epigenetic Biological Age | Your whole-body summary | ✓ | no |. | Extrinsic Epigenetic Age | Immune System Impact on Age | ✓ | no |. | Intrinsic Epigenetic Age | Aging Independent of Immune System | ✓ | no |. | Lifestyle suggestions sourced to the latest public research on epigenetic aging | ✓ | ✓ |. All aging algorithms we use have been developed around, and verified against samples from whole blood. Our default blood collection method included in TruAge kits is the blood spot card. * Ongoing private research to develop new aging algorithms and identify new Trait Reports - your past TruAge reports will continue to grow over time.

results.title: TruDiagnostic™ Biological Age Test
results.content: TruDiagnostic™ offers a range of tests, including TruAge™ and TruHealth™, which provide a comprehensive view of your overall health and aging. TruDiagnostic's™ tests are based on cutting-edge epigenetic research and are developed in collaboration with leading academic institutions. By routinely taking the test, you can measure the impact of lifestyle changes you make to improve your epigenetic health. [Shop Test](https://shop.trudiagnostic.com/products/truage-complete-epigenetic-collection). TruHealth™ gives you deep insight into your body’s functional nutritional and systems health by testing +105 biomarkers and +75 antioxidants, vitamins, fatty acids. [Shop Test](https://shop.trudiagnostic.com/products/truhealth). [Shop Test](https://shop.trudiagnostic.com/products/truage-truhealth). TruHealth™ measures your cellular health across multiple biological systems by testing 105+ biomarkers and antioxidants, vitamins, fatty acids, and more. Our SymphonyAge™ score decodes how your different organ systems are aging, like your brain, heart, liver, and lungs, as a key component of our TruAge™ test. Our DunedinPace™ score tracks your aging speed at the cellular level and gives personal recommendations to improve as a core insight of our TruAge™ test. [Shop Our Tests](https://shop.trudiagnostic.com/collections/shopfront).

results.content: TruAge PACE is an at-home epigenetic test that evaluates the rate of your body's aging at a cellular level. Designed for anti-aging enthusiasts,

results.title: TruAge
results.content: Created with science from Harvard, Yale, and Duke, the TruAge™ test measures +75 key biomarkers for longevity to give you the most precise, accurate, and actionable insights about your aging. This system-specific epigenetic aging algorithm offers insights into how organs such as the brain, liver, heart, and immune system age, helping you understand the unique aging process of each part of your body. Our detailed SYMPHONYAge™ reports offer comprehensive insights into the aging processes of your various organ systems. DunedinPACE™ offers focused insights into your aging process, helping you understand the impact of various factors on your biological age. These insights enable you to make informed decisions about lifestyle and medical interventions to optimize your health and slow down the aging process. Discover aging insights on eleven organ systems with SYMPHONYAge™, using Yale University's system-specific, epigenetic aging algorithms. Upgrade your previous TruAge COMPLETE test(s) to gain digital access to the epigenetic age calculations in our SYMPHONYAge™ reports, including:.
